scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -n api,web -c orange,cyan "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:api:tunnel: dotenv -e .env -e .env.tunnel -- concurrently -n api,tunnel -c orange,blue "pnpm --filter @yt-dlp-web-downloader/server dev" "cloudflared tunnel --config .cloudflared/yt-dlp-web-downloader.yml --loglevel warn --transport-loglevel warn run yt-dlp-web-downloader"
